backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing audio post management, user profiles, favorites, and access control with mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three features related to investigating and fixing mobile deployment loading issues, adding error handling, and cross-browser testing.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend components including App, Header, navigation, search, audio cards, upload forms, player, and pages with kids mode and authentication features.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, including color schemes for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with loading screen, error screen UI, mobile-optimized meta tags, and inline styles for loading/error states before React initialization.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component configuring QueryClient, router with all page routes, InternetIdentityProvider, PlayerProvider, error boundary, and kids mode class application with onboarding redirect logic.
frontend/src/components/auth/InterestsCh: Checkbox group component for selecting user interests from a list, displayed in a two-column scrollable grid.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: Category filter chips component displaying selectable category buttons with premium styling and active state management from feed filters store.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Displays a welcome hero card for users with no uploaded audio, showing profile completion progress and a CTA button to navigate to the upload page.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Favori: Renders a card displaying the user's favorited audio posts in a grid layout, with optional filtering for kid-friendly content and conversion from AudioPost to MockAudioItem format.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/MyCont: Displays the user's uploaded audio content in a grid of AudioCards, with optional kid-friendly filtering and conversion from backend AudioPost format to MockAudioItem.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Statis: Shows two stat cards displaying total uploads and total listens with formatted numbers, supporting kid-friendly content filtering to calculate filtered statistics.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioCard.t: Main audio post card component with play/pause controls, like/favorite buttons, comments panel, audio replies section, and delete functionality for owned content. Integrates with player context and backend mutations for listens, favorites, and post removal.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioReplie: Collapsible section that fetches and displays audio replies to a post, with kid-friendly filtering and conversion from AudioPost to MockAudioItem format for rendering in AudioCards.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioReplyD: Modal dialog for creating audio replies to posts with title, description, and audio file inputs, including duration validation, upload progress tracking, and kid-friendly mode support.
frontend/src/components/feed/CommentsPan: Displays a list of comments with avatars, author names, timestamps, and content, or shows a placeholder message when no comments exist.
frontend/src/components/feed/ProceduralC: Renders either a custom thumbnail or a procedurally generated category-based cover image, with fallback logic to avoid specific placeholder images.
frontend/src/components/language/Languag: Multi-select dropdown for choosing languages with search filtering, custom language addition, and displays selected count or language names.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandingB: Displays a centered header banner image with fallback text 'SPEAKR' and includes a dropdown menu in the top-left corner.
Dropdown menu with navigation links to About, Categories, Contact, Help/FAQ, Terms, and Privacy pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/ErrorBoun: React error boundary component that catches errors, displays error details with stack traces, and provides buttons to reload or clear browser storage.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingB: Floating action button that navigates back to the feed, hidden when the mini-player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingL: Floating button with popover for filtering feed by language, supporting search, custom language addition, and multi-select with badge count display.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main header component with centered logo, menu dropdown, search bar, navigation items, and authentication controls (login/logout/dashboard).
frontend/src/components/layout/PrimaryNa: Primary navigation bar with Feed, Explore, Upload links and a Kids Mode toggle button, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: Multi-step onboarding wizard component that guides users through discovering audio, sharing voice, and using the mini-player with animated icons and progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/player/MiniPlaye: Fixed bottom mini-player bar with playback controls, progress slider, volume control, and procedural cover art display for the currently playing audio item.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: Search input component that updates feed filters and auto-selects default language when user focuses or types in the search field.
frontend/src/components/upload/AudioSour: Tabbed component allowing users to either upload audio files or record directly in the browser with MediaRecorder API, enforcing configurable maximum duration limits.
frontend/src/components/upload/CategoryP: Dropdown combobox for selecting predefined categories or creating custom ones with search and keyboard navigation support.
frontend/src/components/upload/UploadFor: Complete audio upload form handling title, description, category, audio file/recording, language selection, kid-friendly flag, and submission with progress tracking to the backend.
frontend/src/components/upload/useAudioD: Custom hook that validates audio file duration against a configurable maximum (default 3 hours) by loading metadata and formatting error messages.
frontend/src/constants/categories.ts: Defines the available audio categories as a typed constant array including All, Entertainment, Technology, Food, Sports, Politics, Music, and Work.
frontend/src/constants/categoryColors.ts: Maps categories to gradient background colors and badge styles for consistent theming, with helper functions to retrieve color classes by category name.
frontend/src/constants/interests.ts: Defines INTERESTS array by combining base categories (excluding 'All') with additional interests like Art, Business, Gaming, etc.
frontend/src/constants/languages.ts: Exports SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES array containing ISO 639-1 language codes and labels, including a 'none' option for music content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioReplies.ts: React Query hook that fetches audio post replies by filtering user content for posts replying to a specific postId.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomLanguages.ts: Hook for managing custom user-added languages with localStorage persistence, duplicate detection, and alphabetical sorting alongside built-in languages.
frontend/src/hooks/useFavorites.ts: React Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's favorite audio posts from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and identity persistence with AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useKidFriendlyContent: React Query hook that fetches kid-friendly audio posts from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyContent.ts: Hook providing queries and mutations for fetching, editing, and deleting the current user's audio posts with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts: Hook managing onboarding completion state in localStorage with methods to mark complete or reset.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of mutation hooks for audio post operations (add, listen, remove, favorite/unfavorite) with toast notifications and query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserStatistics.ts: React Query hook that fetches user statistics from the backend actor when authenticated.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light, dark, and kids-mode themes using OKLCH color space, plus utility classes for elevated cards and glass buttons.
frontend/src/lib/draftFeedItems.ts: Manages draft audio items in localStorage with functions to save, retrieve, remove, and subscribe to changes, converting File objects to data URLs for storage.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers with K/M/B suffixes and converting seconds to MM:SS duration format.
frontend/src/lib/proceduralCovers.ts: Generates deterministic SVG cover images for audio items based on category and seed using seeded random numbers and category-specific OKLCH color schemes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/mock/mockAudio.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for audio items and comments, plus provides mock audio data for development.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Simple About page component displaying placeholder content about the SPEAKR platform mission.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Authentication page with tabbed login and registration forms, including email/password inputs and interests selection for new users.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Simple Contact page component displaying placeholder content for future contact information.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Protected dashboard page showing user statistics, favorites, and content with authentication checks, kids mode filtering, and empty state handling.
frontend/src/pages/ExplorePage.tsx: Displays a grid of category cards for browsing audio content, with support for kids mode filtering and navigation to filtered feed views.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Main feed page that displays audio items with filtering by search, category, and language; supports both regular and kids mode with backend and draft content integration.
frontend/src/pages/HelpPage.tsx: Placeholder page for help and FAQ content with a simple coming soon message.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Onboarding wizard page that guides new users through setup and navigates to home upon completion or skip.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Placeholder page for privacy policy content with a coming soon message.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Placeholder page for terms of service content with a coming soon message.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Audio upload page that renders the UploadForm component for users to share audio content.
frontend/src/player/PlayerProvider.tsx: React context provider that manages global audio player state including playback, progress, volume, and current item with HTML5 Audio API integration.
frontend/src/state/feedFilters.ts: Zustand store for managing feed filters (search, category, languages) with persistence and auto-selection of browser default language.
frontend/src/state/kidsMode.ts: Zustand store for managing kids mode toggle state with sessionStorage persistence.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom shadows, Inter font family, border radius utilities, and animation keyframes for accordions and speaker pulse effects.
project_state.json: Project state document tracking a web application with audio upload/reply system, favorites, kid-friendly content filtering with PIN authentication, and admin management. Currently experiencing a critical mobile loading issue in version 44 deployment.
